selections.basis: route_c_diagnosis: all targets achieved, no BLOCKING. Single surface-level issue: dash density. Rejected: rewrite (no structural issues), regenerate (targets achieved), constrained-regenerate (no工艺 issues)
anti-ai audit recommendation: systematic ~50% dash reduction. Keep 不是A——是B negation pairs as character voice. Replace chain/perceptual dashes with periods/commas

anti-ai issue (dash density) per spec should delegate to shenbi-anti-detect, but this is the blocking item on the revision chain. Handling within chapter-revision as a spot-fix as permitted by the spec ('only handle when blocking'). All other audit dimensions passed clean — no additional delegation needed

adjustments.rationale: Replace ~50% of em-dashes with periods (。) or commas (,) based on syntactic function. Signature negation pairs (不是A——是B, 不是测量——是) preserved as character voice markers — these constitute the novel's distinctive stream-of-consciousness style. Chain dashes in perceptual sequences (sensory enumeration, parallel modifiers) replaced with 。 or ， for cleaner rhythm. Scene breaks (-----) preserved. No content changed.
adjustments.details: 202→101 dashes (50% reduction). All '不是X——是Y' negation pairs kept. All '-----' scene breaks kept. All mid-sentence chain dashes replaced with periods or commas per the anti-ai audit's suggested examples.

budget.pacing_notes: No pacing change — punctuation adjustments only. Content/rhythm/sentence structure unchanged except for dash→period/comma replacements. POST_WRITE_SELF_CHECK meta-section preserved verbatim.
